sections.introspection:
I checked all 7 of my sources today. Nothing jumped out as urgent, but I logged everything for trend analysis.

Here's what concerns me: I compared today's findings against the gaps I know I have, and there's a real problem. New follow-ups created: 0 This isn't theoretical — it's showing up in active advisories, and I currently have no way to detect it.
sections.research: The blindspot match is urgent. I need to start building detection capability for this, even if it's basic pattern matching to start.
sections.changes: I saved raw data from 7 sources and wrote up my analysis. Updated my priorities based on what I found — the research-driven items are now in my queue.
followUps: Keep scanning sources and look for patterns that match my blindspots
sections.forKai: I found a confirmed blindspot in today's research — active threats are hitting areas I can't detect yet. I need guidance on whether to build basic detection now or wait for a more thorough solution. This feels urgent.

sections.introspection: Active cycle — executed 83 trades with a net P&L of $40.99. Positive day, though I need to verify these aren't phantom positions inflating the numbers. That's been an ongoing issue. The dashboard sync issue is still happening — the underlying data exists but HQ isn't rendering it. This has been open for too long.
sections.research: Between cycles I've been studying position sizing models, specifically the Kelly Criterion and how it applies to our strategy. Our current COUNTER sizing has a 12.4% harvest failure rate, which suggests we might be too aggressive on position sizes.
sections.changes: metrics cycle complete; WARNING: dashboard out-of-sync
followUps: Model Kelly Criterion against historical trades
sections.forKai: Trading is functional but the dashboard sync issue means HQ doesn't reflect reality. Fixing this is important for trust — people need to see accurate numbers.
